yaml.title: 👨🏻‍💻 Teaching
yaml.subtitle: Courses I've taught or assisted in, across social science and data science

markdown.markdown:
**Machine Learning** -- Methodological Training of [MAPE](https://mape.org.br/) (2025.2, Graduate)  
  _Fundamentals of machine learning, focusing on recognizing, training, interpreting, and evaluating simple predictive models applied to social research._   
  🔗 [Files](https://github.com/felipelmc/Presentations/tree/main/ML-FMMAPE-2025)

**Deep Learning & Text-as-Data** -- 10th Student Week of the Postgraduate Programs of IESP-UERJ (2025.2, Graduate)  
_Fundamentals of deep learning: what it is and how to train a neural network, and text-as-data with deep learning._   
🔗 [Files](https://github.com/felipelmc/Presentations/tree/main/Minicurso-DL-Jornada-Discente-IESP-2025)

## 🧑‍🏫 Teaching Assistance

**Advanced Text-as-Data** -- IESP-UERJ Winter School (2025.1, Graduate)  
  _Deep Learning, Transformers, Embeddings, and Large Language Models applied to political science research._  
  Instructors: [Tiago Ventura](https://www.venturatiago.com/), Ph.D., and [Sebastián Vallejo Vera](https://www.svallejovera.com/), Ph.D.  
  🔗 [Course website](https://tiagoventura.github.io/tad_iesp_workshop/)

**Quantitative Methods II** -- FGV CPDOC (2024.2, Undergraduate)    
  _Exploratory data analysis, basic statistical inference, and regression models._    
  Instructor: [Jairo Nicolau](https://cpdoc.fgv.br/equipe/jaironicolau), Ph.D.

**Introduction to R** -- FGV CPDOC (2020.2, Graduate)  
  _Introduction to programming for social sciences._  
  Instructor: [Jimmy Medeiros](https://cpdoc.fgv.br/equipe/JimmyMedeiros), Ph.D.
